Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Undroidwish – a single-file, batteries-included Tcl/Tk binary for many platforms 71 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. A Verilog to Factorio Compiler and Simulator (Working RISC-V CPU) 48 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. OpenBSD on Motorola 88000 Processors 76 upvotes, 8 comments
  4. I Built an Open-World Engine for the N64 [video] 378 upvotes, 64 comments
  5. Cat Itecture: Better Cat Window Boxes 42 upvotes, 4 comments
  6. Founder of GitLab battles cancer by founding companies 872 upvotes, 193 comments
  7. CSS is DOOMed 267 upvotes, 62 comments
  8. Linux is an interpreter 186 upvotes, 41 comments
  9. The 667MHz Machine 37 upvotes, 5 comments
  10. Detecting file changes on macOS with kqueue 73 upvotes, 14 comments
  11. Spanish legislation as a Git repo 711 upvotes, 217 comments
  12. Improved Git Diffs with Delta, Fzf and a Little Shell Scripting 139 upvotes, 36 comments
  13. The ANSI art "telecomics" of the 1992 election 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  14. OpenCiv1 – open-source rewrite of Civ1 124 upvotes, 34 comments
  15. Meta Partners with Arm to Develop New Class of Data Center Silicon 56 upvotes, 13 comments
  16. I decompiled the White House's new app 467 upvotes, 177 comments
  17. OpenYak – An open-source Cowork that runs any model and owns your filesystem 49 upvotes, 14 comments
  18. Sealing Paper Packaging Without Adhesives 56 upvotes, 17 comments
  19. South Korea Mandates Solar Panels for Public Parking Lots 267 upvotes, 146 comments
  20. The first 40 months of the AI era 157 upvotes, 84 comments
  21. Show HN: PeriodicTableOfElements.org 20 upvotes, 6 comments
  22. Alzheimer's disease mortality among taxi and ambulance drivers (2024) 87 upvotes, 45 comments
  23. Further human + AI + proof assistant work on Knuth's "Claude Cycles" problem 185 upvotes, 122 comments
  24. AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice 593 upvotes, 447 comments
  25. Hacking old hardware by renaming to .zip [video] 109 upvotes, 82 comments
  26. The case for becoming a manager 21 upvotes, 11 comments
  27. 1929: Inside the Greatest Crash in Wall Street History 64 upvotes, 51 comments
  28. Google just gave Android power users a sideloading win 75 upvotes, 86 comments
  29. Modeling what makes paper-folding puzzles hard 14 upvotes, 12 comments
  30. InpharmD (YC W21) Is Hiring – Senior Ruby on Rails Developer 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 2:30pm, 29 March 2026. Source here.
